title: Logistics Sales Executive (Hunter / Sea Freight)
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • New Business Development: Actively hunt for and secure new clients within the Singapore market and regionally.

  • Prospecting & Lead Generation: Conduct extensive market research to identify and qualify new sales leads and potential customers.

  • Cold Calling: Initiate contact with potential clients through persistent and strategic cold calling and email outreach.

  • Sales Pipeline Management: Build and maintain a robust sales pipeline, managing the entire sales cycle from first contact to close.

  • Client Needs Analysis: Understand the specific logistics needs of prospective clients and develop tailored air and ocean freight solutions.

  • Presentation & Pitching: Prepare and deliver compelling sales presentations and proposals that effectively communicate our value proposition.

  • CRM Management: Accurately record all sales activities, client interactions, and pipeline updates in our CRM system.

  • Market Intelligence: Stay informed about industry trends, market conditions, and competitor activities.

Requirements:

  • Minimum of 2 years of working experience in logistics industry or freight forwarding sales role, with a strong focus on hunting new business.

  • Understanding of international freight forwarding (air and ocean) processes and terminology.

  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.

  • Self-motivated, proactive, and resilient with a strong drive to succeed.

  • Having an existing network of contacts with shipping agencies in Singapore.

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref71@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
